hero.title: Kuza
hero.description: Urubuga rugezweho rw'amatsinda y'ubwizigame mu Rwanda. Kurikirana imisanzu, gucunga inguzanyo, no kubaka ubutunzi bw'umuryango—byose ahantu hamwe hizewe.
hero.demoDescription: Reba uko byoroshye gucunga itsinda ryawe ry'Ikimina n'urubuga rwacu

features.title: Ibyo
features.description: Ibikoresho bikomeye byateguwe cyane cyane ku matsinda y'ubwizigame y'u Rwanda. Byoroshye gukoresha, byizewe by'agateganyo.

contributionTracking.title: Gukurikirana Imisanzu
contributionTracking.description: Kurikirana imisanzu ya buri kwezi cyangwa buri cyumweru hamwe n'ibirikumbuzo byikora no kwerekana abishyuye batinze.

smartLoans.title: Inguzanyo Zihanga
smartLoans.description: Gucunga inguzanyo hamwe n'ingingo z'inyungu zihinduka, kubara inyungu bikora, n'imishinga yo kwishyura.

memberManagement.title: Gucunga Abanyamuryango
memberManagement.description: Kwinjiza abanyamuryango bashya byoroshye, gutanga inshingano, no gukurikirana amateka y'imisanzu ku muntu ku muntu.

groupIsolation.title: Ubuzima Bwite bw'Itsinda
groupIsolation.description: Amakuru yose aba yibanda ku itsinda ryawe gusa. Buri tsinda ribona amakuru yaryo gusa.

reportsAnalytics.title: Raporo n'Isesengura
reportsAnalytics.description: Imibare y'igihe nyacyo igaragaza ubwizigame bwose, inguzanyo zikora, inyungu zabonetse, n'imikoreshereze y'abanyamuryango.

smartNotifications.title: Ibimenyetso Bihanga
smartNotifications.description: Ibirikumbuzo bikora byikora ku munsi w'imisanzu, kwishyura inguzanyo, n'amakuru y'ingenzi.

exportReports.title: Gukura Raporo
exportReports.description: Kuramo raporo zuzuye mu buryo bwa PDF cyangwa CSV ku kubika inyandiko no kugenzura.

secureAuth.title: Kwemererwa Gutewe
secureAuth.description: Umutekano nk'uw'ibanki hamwe n'uburenganzira bw'abayobozi, abamukarani, n'abanyamuryango.

howItWorks.title: Uko
howItWorks.description: Tangira ikimina cyawe mu ntambwe enye zoroshye

step1.title: Kora Itsinda Ryawe
step1.description: Shiraho Ikimina yawe mu minota mike. Ongeraho abanyamuryango kandi ushyireho amategeko y'imisanzu.

step2.title: Kwakira Imisanzu
step2.description: Abanyamuryango batanga imisanzu buri gihe. Kurikirana kwishyura no kohereza ibirikumbuzo bikora.

step3.title: Gucunga Inguzanyo
step3.description: Gutanga inguzanyo n'inyungu. Kurikirana kwishyura no kubara inyungu bikora.

step4.title: Gukura Hamwe
step4.description: Reba ubutunzi bw'itsinda ryawe bukura. Bona raporo kandi mwishimire intsinzi hamwe.

pricing.title: Ibiciro Byoroheje,
pricing.description: Hitamo gahunda ikwiriye itsinda ryawe. Ibiciro byose mu mafaranga y'u Rwanda (RWF).

paymentInfo.title: Amakuru y'Ubwishyu
paymentInfo.description: Kugira ngo wiyandikishe ku gahunda yishyurwa, ohereza kwishyu kwawe binyuze muri Mobile Money kuri:
paymentInfo.note: Nyuma yo kwishyura, twandikire hamwe na nimero y'ubwishyu kugira ngo dutangire gahunda yawe.

cta.title: Witeguye Guhindura Ikimina Yawe?
cta.description: Ifatanye n'amatsinda y'ubwizigame y'u Rwanda amaze gukoresha eKimina mu kubaka ubutunzi bw'umuryango mu buziranenge no kwizerwa.
cta.note: Nta karita y'amafaranga isabwa • Ubuntu buhoraho ku matsinda mato

footer.description: Urubuga rugezweho rw'amatsinda y'ubwizigame y'u Rwanda. Kubaka ubutunzi bw'umuryango mu cyizere no kumarana neza.

auth.signInDescription: Injira kugira ngo ucunge itsinda ry'Ikimina ryawe
auth.createAccountDescription: Tangira gucunga Ikimina yawe uyu munsi

validation.passwordMin: Ijambo ry'ibanga rigomba kugira nibura inyuguti 6

dashboard.title: Ikibanza Cy'Imikorere
dashboard.shareCode: Sangira iyi kode kugira ngo utumire abanyamuryango:
dashboard.noContributionsDesc: Tangira kwandika imisanzu y'abanyamuryango kugira ngo uyibone hano.
dashboard.noActiveLoansDesc: Iyo abanyamuryango bafashe inguzanyo, zizagaragara hano.
dashboard.sendRemindersDesc: Ohereza ibirikumbuzo kugira ngo wishyurwe ku gihe
dashboard.contributionHistoryDesc: Amateka y'imisanzu yawe azagaragara hano iyo kwishyura byanditswe.
dashboard.noAnnouncementsDesc: Amatangazo y'itsinda aturuka ku muyobozi wawe azagaragara hano.

onboarding.createNewDesc: Tangira itsinda ryawe ry'ubwizigame kandi utumire abanyamuryango
onboarding.joinExistingDesc: Andika kode y'itsinda kugira ngo winjire mu nshuti zawe
onboarding.restoreOldDesc: Subira mu Ikimina wari uyibariyemo mbere
onboarding.joinDesc: Andika kode y'itsinda yasangijwe n'umuyobozi wawe
onboarding.groupCodeHelp: Saba umuyobozi w'itsinda ryawe aguhe kode y'itsinda
onboarding.restoreDesc: Saba gusubira mu itsinda wari uyibariyemo mbere
onboarding.noGroupsDesc: Ntidushoboye kubona itsinda wari uyibariyemo mbere.
onboarding.rejoinNote: Icyifuzo cyawe cyo gusubira kizohererezwa umuyobozi w'itsinda ngo yemeze.
onboarding.rejoinSentDesc: Icyifuzo cyawe cyo gusubira mu "{{name}}" cyoherejwe ku muyobozi w'itsinda ngo yemeze.
onboarding.groupNameMin: Izina ry'itsinda rigomba kugira nibura inyuguti 2

membersPage.title: Abanyamuryango
membersPage.noMembersInvite: Tumira abanyamuryango binjire mu itsinda ryawe
membersPage.removeAdminDesc: Uzi neza ko ushaka kuraho uburenganzira bw'umuyobozi bwa {{name}}?
membersPage.grantAdminDesc: Uzi neza ko ushaka guhindura {{name}} umuyobozi? Azashobora gucunga abanyamuryango, imisanzu, n'inguzanyo.
membersPage.removeMemberDesc: Uzi neza ko ushaka gukuraho burundu {{name}} mu itsinda? Iki gikorwa ntikishobora gusubirwaho kandi kizasiba amakuru yose ahuriye.

contributionsPage.title: Imisanzu
contributionsPage.getStarted: Andika umusanzu wa mbere kugira ngo utangire
contributionsPage.recordDesc: Ongeraho inyandiko y'umusanzu ku munyamuryango w'itsinda.
contributionsPage.markPaidDesc: Shyiraho umusanzu wa {{name}} wa RWF {{amount}} ko yishyuwe?

loansPage.title: Gucunga Inguzanyo
loansPage.description: Cunga inguzanyo z'itsinda no gukurikirana kwishyura
loansPage.adjustFilters: Gerageza guhindura ubushakashatsi cyangwa ibyo ushaka
loansPage.getStarted: Kora inguzanyo nshya kugira ngo utangire

historyPage.title: Amateka y'Ibikorwa
historyPage.adminDesc: Reba ibikorwa byose by'itsinda ku munsi

reportsPage.title: Raporo z'Amafaranga
reportsPage.monthlyCashFlow: Inyinjira n'Isoho ry'Amafaranga bya Buri Kwezi
reportsPage.noDataPeriod: Nta makuru aboneka ku gihe cyahiswemo

announcementsPage.title: Amatangazo
announcementsPage.adminDesc: Kora no gucunga amatangazo ku banyamuryango b'itsinda ryawe
announcementsPage.memberDesc: Amakuru y'ingenzi aturuka ku muyobozi w'itsinda ryawe
announcementsPage.noAnnouncementsDesc: Kora itangazo rya mbere kugira ngo umenyeshe abanyamuryango b'itsinda ryawe.
announcementsPage.noAnnouncementsMemberDesc: Amatangazo y'itsinda aturuka ku muyobozi wawe azagaragara hano.

settingsPage.title: Igenamiterere
settingsPage.annualInterestRate: Igipimo cy'inyungu cya buri mwaka ku nguzanyo
settingsPage.constitutionDesc: Shyiraho amategeko, ibihano, n'amabwiriza y'itsinda ryawe ry'ubwizigame
settingsPage.loanUpdatesDesc: Kubona amakuru ku bisabwa by'inguzanyo no kwishyura
settingsPage.smsRemindersDesc: Kubona ibirikumbuzo kuri SMS ku bikorwa by'ingenzi
settingsPage.passwordDesc: Hindura ijambo ry'ibanga kugira ngo konti yawe ibeho umutekano
settingsPage.sessionsDesc: Cunga imikoreshwa yakora kandi usohoke ku bikoresho bindi
settingsPage.dangerZoneDesc: Gusiba burundu konti yawe n'amakuru yose ahuriye

memberContributions.title: Imisanzu Yanjye
memberContributions.noContributionsYet: Amateka y'imisanzu yawe azagaragara hano iyo kwishyura byanditswe.

memberLoans.title: Inguzanyo Zanjye
memberLoans.noLoansDesc: Amateka y'inguzanyo zawe azagaragara hano iyo ufashe inguzanyo mu itsinda.
memberLoans.requestSentDesc: Icyifuzo cyawe cy'inguzanyo cyoherejwe ku muyobozi w'itsinda ngo yemeze.
memberLoans.requestNote: Icyifuzo cyawe kizasuzumwa n'umuyobozi w'itsinda. Igipimo cy'inyungu gishyirwaho n'itsinda ryawe.

pendingApprovalPage.title: Kwishyura Bitegerejwe
pendingApprovalPage.description: Gahunda yawe ya Growth ya {{groupName}} itegereje kwemezwa kw'ubwishyu.
pendingApprovalPage.step2: Koresha nimero iri hasi kugira ngo wishyure
pendingApprovalPage.step4: Ikipe yacu izabyemeza kandi itangire konti yawe

groupDisabled.title: Itsinda Ryahagaritswe
groupDisabled.description: Itsinda ryawe ry'Ikimina {{groupName}} ryahagaritswe by'agateganyo n'umuyobozi w'urubuga.
groupDisabled.noAccess: Ntushobora kugera ku kibanza cy'itsinda ryawe
groupDisabled.dataSafe: Amakuru yawe ari umutekano kandi abitswe
groupDisabled.contactAdmin: Vugana n'umuyobozi w'itsinda cyangwa ubufasha bw'urubuga kugira ngo ubone amakuru menshi.

unauthorized.title: Kwinjira Byanzwe
unauthorized.description: Ntufite uburenganzira bwo kugera kuri uru rupapuro. Nyamuneka vugana n'umuyobozi w'itsinda ryawe niba utekereza ko ari ikosa.

systemNotices.title: Amatangazo y'Urubuga
systemNotices.description: Amatangazo y'ingenzi aturuka ku rubuga rwa eKimina
systemNotices.checkBack: Garuka nyuma ku makuru y'ingenzi y'urubuga.

contact.title: Twandikire
contact.description: Ufite ibibazo cyangwa ukeneye ubufasha? Turi hano ku bwawe. Twandikire kandi tuzagusubiza vuba.
contact.formDescription: Uzuza ifishi ikurikira kandi tuzagusubiza mu masaha 24
contact.name: Izina Ryawe
contact.subject: Insanganyamatsiko
